commodities.title: Cedar LNG Build Moves Ahead While Gas Supply Questions Loom Over Future Expansion
commodities.description: Construction progress of the Cedar LNG project and relaxing constraints in Western Canada is lifting outlooks for oilsands producers, according to Pembina Pipeline Corp. management, but future expansions still hinge on whether the basin can provide more natural gas supply.

commodities.title: Qatar Braces for Lengthy Shutdown at Ras Laffan, Begins Leasing Idle LNG Tankers
commodities.description: QatarEnergy’s CEO Saad Sherida Al-Kaabi told the Financial Times the country would not be able to restart LNG production at its shuttered Ras Laffan Industrial complex until the conflict raging in the Middle East ends completely.

commodities.title: Donald Trump exige la "capitulation totale" de l'Iran pour mettre fin à la guerre
commodities.description: [VIDÉO] ▶️ Donald Trump a exigé ce vendredi "la capitulation totale" de l'Iran avant tout "accord" de paix avec le pays. Le républicain souhaite voir arriver au pouvoir "un dirigeant juste et équitable" à Téhéran. Le président américain a également dit ne pas s'inquiéter de la hausse des cours du pétrole. - Donald Trump exige la "capitulation totale" de l'Iran pour mettre fin à la guerre (International).

ai_tech.title: Google AI Releases Android Bench: An Evaluation Framework and Leaderboard for LLMs in Android Development
ai_tech.description: Google has officially released Android Bench, a new leaderboard and evaluation framework designed to measure how Large Language Models (LLMs) perform specifically on Android development tasks.
